title: lamium garganicum var. microphyllum
intro: Lamium garganicum var. microphyllum is a variety of the Lamiaceae family plant, also known as Garganic Spurred Vervain or Dwarf Spurred Vervain. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lamium garganicum var. microphyllum include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used topically in the form of a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions and wounds.
